source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in Figure 3 of the question, \(a\), \(b\), \(c\), \(d\), and \(e\) are straight conductors carrying the same current. \(a\), \(b\), \(c\), and \(d\) are located at the four vertices of a square, and \(e\) is located at the center. The direction of the electromagnetic force experienced by conductor \(e\) is:
